summary: Integrated ADR 0305 onto main as repository version 0.177.120 after origin/main first advanced to commit 2411a7cd428e0eba17168aa5eed66f04c4ed48dd and later to commit 97f05802253cbb8fb4640249fdb8485fd7ecdde6, which still carried repository version 0.177.119 and platform version 0.130.77 after ADR 0306 landed. The canonical mainline receipt preserves both the earlier repaired 0.177.118 comparison baseline and the latest realistic 0.177.119 k6 degradation evidence from committed source 6d476f01e75a2ecf31d8ce13df1250bc6aec193e: public Keycloak OIDC returned 502 Bad Gateway, Keycloak smoke failed 110 of 110 requests, Keycloak load failed 1184 of 1600 requests (74.00%), and OpenFGA load failed 14 of 1182 requests (1.18%). The final integrated 0.177.120 verification then passed end to end: focused pytest for run_gate_fallback, remote_exec, and iac_policy_scan passed with 21 tests and 1 skip, make check-build-server passed, make remote-validate passed with the merged iac-policy-scan lane, and make pre-push-gate recovered from transient 502 Bad Gateway pulls of registry.lv3.org/check-runner/infra:2026.03.23 by syncing the partial remote status back and rerunning only unresolved packer-validate and tofu-validate checks locally.

verification.observed: The final merge-to-main closeout targeted origin/main commit 97f05802253cbb8fb4640249fdb8485fd7ecdde6, which already carried repository version 0.177.119 and platform version 0.130.77 after ADR 0306 landed. The earlier exact-main comparison baselines at origin/main commits 5c7e07235f7b0da1f756148e145397f0ac6ceb10 and 2411a7cd428e0eba17168aa5eed66f04c4ed48dd remain committed for audit comparison.

The first exact-main closeout from committed source 0d6e8c9eb5d9d086e74cf92d8165248295baa076 repaired the Prometheus private-bind drift, then produced passing smoke receipts with Keycloak 110/0 and OpenFGA 112/0 plus the truthful 0.177.118 load comparison receipts with Keycloak 1585/441 and OpenFGA 1184/8.

The latest-main smoke replay from committed source 6d476f01e75a2ecf31d8ce13df1250bc6aec193e preserved current live-platform truth instead of hiding it: https://sso.lv3.org/realms/lv3/.well-known/openid-configuration returned 502 Bad Gateway, receipts/k6/smoke-keycloak-20260331T145155Z.json recorded 110 requests with 110 failures, receipts/k6/smoke-openfga-20260331T145155Z.json still recorded 112 requests with 0 failures, and guest-local probing timed out on http://10.10.10.20:8091/health/ready.

The latest-main load replay from the same committed source preserved the degraded platform outcome in receipts/k6/load-keycloak-20260331T145555Z.json, receipts/k6/load-openfga-20260331T145555Z.json, and receipts/k6/raw/20260331T145555Z-load-summary.json. Keycloak recorded 1600 requests with 1184 failures (74.00% error rate), OpenFGA recorded 1182 requests with 14 failures (1.18%), Prometheus remote-write repeatedly timed out, and the warning-only ntfy publication path returned 404 Not Found without hanging the run.

uv run --with pytest pytest tests/test_run_gate_fallback.py passed 2 tests, and uv run --with pytest pytest tests/test_remote_exec.py passed 16 tests, proving the synced remote status handoff, validation-lane context preservation, and unresolved-only local fallback reruns.

make remote-validate passed with workstream-surfaces, agent-standards, ansible-syntax, schema-validation, policy-validation, alert-rule-validation, type-check, and dependency-graph all marked passed. The final make pre-push-gate then synced the partial remote status file back after transient 502 Bad Gateway pulls of registry.lv3.org/check-runner/infra:2026.03.23 left packer-validate and tofu-validate runner_unavailable, preserved one post-edit controller-local packer timeout proof in r5, widened packer-validate from 120 to 300 seconds in config/validation-gate.json and config/check-runner-manifest.json, reran only those unresolved checks locally via scripts/run_gate_fallback.py, and passed cleanly on r6.

After cutting repository version 0.177.120, uv run --with pytest pytest tests/test_run_gate_fallback.py tests/test_remote_exec.py tests/test_iac_policy_scan.py passed 21 tests with 1 skipped, make check-build-server passed against docker-build-lv3, make remote-validate passed with workstream-surfaces through dependency-graph including iac-policy-scan, and make pre-push-gate passed after the remote builder again hit transient 502 Bad Gateway pulls for registry.lv3.org/check-runner/infra:2026.03.23, synced the partial status back, and reran only packer-validate and tofu-validate locally.

correction_loop.repair_action: Completed make converge-monitoring from the rebased exact-main tree and documented the final Prometheus bind correction so the service listened on 0.0.0.0:9090 instead of 127.0.0.1:9090.
correction_loop.verification: systemctl cat lv3-prometheus showed --web.listen-address=0.0.0.0:9090, ss -ltnp showed Prometheus listening on *:9090, and the build host reached http://10.10.10.40:9090/-/ready before the repaired 0.177.118 smoke rerun that now remains committed as the comparison baseline.

notes: This receipt records the latest-main exact-main integration closeout for ADR 0305; the first verified live platform implementation still occurred earlier on platform version 0.130.75.

Platform version context now records the newest realistic integration baseline, 0.130.77, but no additional platform_version bump is taken because ADR 0305 was already live before the mainline closeout; repository version advances to 0.177.120 because origin/main already recorded ADR 0306 on 0.177.119.

The repaired 0.177.118 smoke-pass and load-fail receipts remain committed beside the 0.177.119 latest-main degradation receipts so the audit trail preserves both the restored comparison baseline and the current live-platform truth, while the final merged repo release becomes 0.177.120.
The final metadata closeout reran ADR index generation, live-apply receipt validation, and git diff hygiene checks on the 0.177.120 merge tree after the integrated remote gates had already passed.

The final pre-push proof set intentionally preserves the transient runner-image pull failures on docker-build-lv3 together with the first post-edit controller-local packer timeout and the later successful unresolved-only local fallback so the branch documents both the repository pass and the remaining build-host registry wrinkle.
